faqs.question: I received a suspicious email claiming to be from you
faqs.answer: Forward to abuse@company.com. We never ask for passwords via email.

faqs.question: How do I report a security vulnerability?
faqs.answer: Email security@company.com with details. We acknowledge within 24 hours.

faqs.question: How do I request my data under GDPR?
faqs.answer: Submit data export request in Settings > Privacy. Delivered within 30 days.
